memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int tick, Id tgt, const Finfo *f2)
memberdef.name: addClockMsg

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int start, unsigned int end, bool isSrcGlobal, unsigned int myNode, vector< vector< Eref > > &erefs, vector< vector< bool > > &targetNodes)
memberdef.name: filterOffNodeTargets

detaileddescription.para:
Picks which messages we retain in the MsgDigest. Does so at two levels:
Builds an array[][] of bools to indicate messages sourced here that go off-node. These will have special HopFuncs added.
Retains entries in erefs that are sourced anywhere, but targetted here. Need to be able to handle off-node messages landing here, as well as the entirely local messages.

memberdef.argsstring: (const vector< vector< MsgDigest > > &md, unsigned int totFunc, unsigned int numData, unsigned int funcNum)
memberdef.name: findNumDigest
